top_signals.title: UK financial regulator moves to allow mutual funds 10% exposure to crypto ETNs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Personal Income and Outlays, December 2025
top_signals.summary: Personal income increased $86.2 billion (0.3 percent at a monthly rate) in December, according to estimates released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. Disposable personal income (DPI)-personal income less personal current taxes-increased $75.7 billion (0.3 percent), and personal consumption expenditures (PCE) increased $91.0 billion (0.4 percent). Personal outlays-the sum of PCE, personal interest payments, and personal current transfer payments-increased $90.2 billion in December. Personal saving was $830.8 billion in December, and the personal saving rate-personal saving as a percentage of disposable personal income-was 3.6 percent. Full Text
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Indonesia hikes rates in surprise off-cycle move to prop up sinking rupiah - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Indonesia hikes rates in surprise off-cycle move to prop up sinking rupiah  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
top_signals.summary: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.

top_signals.title: Ericsson, Epiroc expand alliance to accelerate mining automation
top_signals.summary: Under the agreement, Epiroc will offer Ericsson’s LTE and 5G connectivity solutions as part of its digital portfolio for both surface and underground mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: GDP (Advance Estimate), 4th Quarter and Year 2025
top_signals.summary: Real gross domestic product (GDP) increased at an annual rate of 1.4 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 (October, November, and December), according to the advance estimate released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. In the third quarter, real GDP increased 4.4 percent. The contributors to the increase in real GDP in the fourth quarter were increases in consumer spending and investment. These movements were partly offset by decreases in government spending and exports. Imports, which are a subtraction in the calculation of GDP, decreased. Full Text

top_signals.title: Sigma Lithium wins appeal in Brazil, removing $10M legal order
top_signals.summary: The court win removes a potential obstacle to the company’s expansion plans at one of the largest hard-rock lithium projects in the Americas.
